perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young woman stands in the middle of a warehouse store (Costco), holding two memory foam bath mats (one beige and one grey). She speaks enthusiastically to the camera while holding the products up. (2) Frequent close-up shots show hands pressing into the memory foam material to demonstrate its rebound and texture, along with detailed views of the product labels and the anti-slip backing. (3) The woman is seen exploring the shelves, pointing out various color options (green, grey, white) and finally holding up the packaged sets to indicate the price and quantity.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) The audio begins with an upbeat, rhythmic electronic BGM. A female voice speaks in a high-pitched, enthusiastic tone in Mandarin. (2) A male voice (off-screen) joins the conversation, reacting with surprise and interest to the product features mentioned by the woman. (3) Throughout the video, the soundscape is a mix of these two voices, the continuous BGM, and occasional 'pop' or 'ding' sound effects (SFX) that coincide with on-screen text overlays.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Hook Text: 'COSTCO WHOLESALE', '枕頭能踩地上?' (Can you step on a pillow?), '記憶棉浴室地墊只要237元!' (Memory foam bath mat for only 237!). (2) Decorative/Effect Text: '非常高級' (Very high-end), '洗衣機洗' (Machine washable), '一組才230多!!!' (Only 230+ for a set!!!), and '很厚很讚' (Very thick and great). (3) Functional Text: Chronological subtitles reflecting the Mandarin dialogue between the two speakers.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro -> Detailed Product Demonstration -> Color/Variety Showcase -> Price and Recommendation Outro

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main female creator on-screen; 1 set of male hands appearing in close-ups while holding the mat.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A young woman with long black hair wearing a white long-sleeved shirt under a blue vest.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A large retail warehouse environment (Costco) with tall industrial shelves filled with various home goods and bedding.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: Montage: Hook -> Feature Highlight -> Comparison -> Value Proposition
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video is a promotional product review intended to drive sales for a memory foam bath mat set at Costco. It leverages the contrast between 'pillow comfort' and 'floor mat' to hook the audience, then details the physical benefits (thickness, machine-washable) and low price to create a strong consumer recommendation.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Detailed showcase of product brand (SPA RETREAT), price highlight, and explicit recommendation to buy at Costco.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: High-energy shopping vlog style with variety-show text overlays.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The video targets budget-conscious home goods shoppers, specifically fans of 'Costco finds'.
